name: Damage Zone
description: An area that damages the player continuously while inside. Uses overlap events to start/stop a looping damage timer. Red visual indicator.

customizable.enter_message: Message on enter (default: Entering danger zone!)
customizable.exit_message: Message on exit (default: Left danger zone)

blueprint_dsl:
BLUEPRINT: {{blueprint_name|BP_DamageZone}}
PARENT: Actor

GRAPH: EventGraph

NODE n1: Event_ActorBeginOverlap
NODE n2: PrintString [InString="{{enter_message|Entering danger zone!}}"]
NODE n3: SetTimerByFunctionName [FunctionName="DealDamage", Time={{tick_interval|1.0}}, Looping=true]
NODE n4: Event_ActorEndOverlap
NODE n5: ClearTimerByFunctionName [FunctionName="DealDamage"]
NODE n6: PrintString [InString="{{exit_message|Left danger zone}}"]
NODE n7: Event_CustomEvent [EventName="DealDamage"]
NODE n8: PrintString [InString="-{{damage_per_tick|5}} HP!"]

EXEC n1.Then -> n2.Execute
EXEC n2.Then -> n3.Execute
EXEC n4.Then -> n5.Execute
EXEC n5.Then -> n6.Execute
EXEC n7.Then -> n8.Execute
